heading: Multi-year plan for clean-up
label: 6212 Multi-year plan for clean-up
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2632 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.text: Nuclear weapons activities carried out at the site.
The processing, treating, packaging, and disposal of Department of Energy domestic and foreign spent nuclear fuel rods at the site.
